test-method.name: testEmptyCredentials
test-method.description: Verify error message with empty username and empty password

test-method.name: testEmptyUsername
test-method.description: Verify error message with empty username

test-method.name: testEmptyPassword
test-method.description: Verify error message with empty password

test-method.name: testInvalidUsernameFormat
test-method.description: Verify error message with invalid username format

test-method.name: testInvalidCredentials
test-method.description: Verify error message with invalid credentials

test-method.name: testSpecialCharactersInUsername
test-method.description: Verify error message with special characters in username

test-method.name: testSqlInjectionInUsername
test-method.description: Verify error message with SQL injection attempt in username

test-method.name: testVeryLongUsername
test-method.description: Verify error message with very long username

test-method.name: testSpacesOnlyUsername
test-method.description: Verify error message with spaces only in username

test-method.name: testXssAttemptInPassword
test-method.description: Verify error message with XSS attempt in password

test-method.name: testStaysOnLoginPageAfterFailedLogin
test-method.description: Verify user stays on login page after failed login

test-method.name: testErrorMessageContainsRelevantText
test-method.description: Verify error message contains relevant text

test-method.name: testMultipleFailedLoginAttempts
test-method.description: Verify multiple failed login attempts

exception.message: Error should be displayed on attempt 2 expected [true] but found [false]
exception.full-stacktrace: java.lang.AssertionError: Error should be displayed on attempt 2 expected [true] but found [false] at org.testng.Assert.fail(Assert.java:111) at org.testng.Assert.failNotEquals(Assert.java:1578) at org.testng.Assert.assertTrue(Assert.java:57) at com.salesforce.tests.InvalidLoginTest.testMultipleFailedLoginAttempts(InvalidLoginTest.java:182) at java.base/jdk.internal.reflect.NativeMethodAccessorImpl.invoke0(Native Method) at java.base/jdk.internal.reflect.NativeMethodAccessorImpl.invoke(NativeMethodAccessorImpl.java:77) at java.base/jdk.internal.reflect.DelegatingMethodAccessorImpl.invoke(DelegatingMethodAccessorImpl.java:43) at java.base/java.lang.reflect.Method.invoke(Method.java:568) at org.testng.internal.invokers.MethodInvocationHelper.invokeMethod(MethodInvocationHelper.java:139) at org.testng.internal.invokers.TestInvoker.invokeMethod(TestInvoker.java:664) at org.testng.internal.invokers.TestInvoker.invokeTestMethod(TestInvoker.java:228) at org.testng.internal.invokers.MethodRunner.runInSequence(MethodRunner.java:63) at org.testng.internal.invokers.TestInvoker$MethodInvocationAgent.invoke(TestInvoker.java:961) at org.testng.internal.invokers.TestInvoker.invokeTestMethods(TestInvoker.java:201) at org.testng.internal.invokers.TestMethodWorker.invokeTestMethods(TestMethodWorker.java:148) at org.testng.internal.invokers.TestMethodWorker.run(TestMethodWorker.java:128) at java.base/java.util.concurrent.Executors$RunnableAdapter.call(Executors.java:539) at java.base/java.util.concurrent.FutureTask.run(FutureTask.java:264) at org.testng.internal.thread.graph.TestNGFutureTask.run(TestNGFutureTask.java:22) at java.base/java.util.concurrent.ThreadPoolExecutor.runWorker(ThreadPoolExecutor.java:1136) at java.base/java.util.concurrent.ThreadPoolExecutor$Worker.run(ThreadPoolExecutor.java:635) at java.base/java.lang.Thread.run(Thread.java:833)

test-method.name: testPasswordCaseSensitivity
test-method.description: Verify login with case sensitivity in password

test-method.name: testUnicodeCharactersInUsername
test-method.description: Verify login with unicode characters in username

test-method.name: testLoginPageDisplay
test-method.description: Verify login page is displayed correctly

test-method.name: testLoginPageTitle
test-method.description: Verify page title contains Salesforce

test-method.name: testUsernameFieldEmpty
test-method.description: Verify username field is empty on page load

test-method.name: testPasswordFieldEmpty
test-method.description: Verify password field is empty on page load

test-method.name: testRememberMeUncheckedByDefault
test-method.description: Verify remember me checkbox is not checked by default

test-method.name: testRememberMeCheckboxFunctionality
test-method.description: Verify remember me checkbox can be checked

test-method.name: testLoginPageElementsInteractable
test-method.description: Verify login page elements are interactable
